title: EnchantSense
description: Intelligent enchantment guidance directly in tooltips for all weapons, armor, and tools. Supports swords, mace, trident, spear, bows, and more.”
body:
EnchantSense – Intelligent Enchantment Guidance

![on sword best enchants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb3b2c85f8683d7c0e3350b94d15d279baca6fa3.png)

EnchantSense is a lightweight, client-side Fabric mod that shows the best enchantment combinations directly inside item tooltips.
No GUIs. No menus. No gameplay changes.
Just clear, intelligent enchantment guidance exactly where you need it.

Hover an item, press Left Shift, and instantly see optimized enchantment sets tailored to that item.

🔹 What Does This Mod Do?

EnchantSense enhances item tooltips to display:

The best enchantment sets for each weapon, tool, and armor piece

Clear explanations for enchanted books

Multiple optimized builds you can cycle through

All information appears inside the tooltip, keeping the vanilla experience clean and immersive.

![on book shows description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d249ae659afac41d1cb95555213378ffa052eeb.png)

🔹 Features
⚔ Weapons & Tools

Supports:

Swords

Axes

Mace

Spear

Tridents

Bows & Crossbows

Each item shows optimal enchant combinations designed for real gameplay use.

🛡 Armor Enchantment Sets

Every armor piece includes four specialized builds:

Stealth

Mobility

Water

Ice

Perfect for different playstyles and situations.

📘 Enchantment Coverage

All vanilla enchantments

Newer enchantments such as:

Mace: Density, Breach, Wind Burst

Spear: Lunge

🧠 Lightweight & Safe

Client-only

No servers required

Multiplayer-safe

Tooltip-only (no screens, no UI clutter)

⚙ Version Support

Minecraft 1.21.11

Fabric Loader

🔹 How to Use

Install Fabric Loader (1.21.11)

Place the EnchantSense .jar file into your mods folder

Launch Minecraft

Hover over any supported item in your inventory

(Elytra and Shield are not included)

Press Left Shift to expand enchantment details

Use Left Arrow / Right Arrow keys to cycle through enchantment sets

Read the tooltip to choose the best enchantments for your gear

That’s it — no commands, no menus.

🔹 Why Download EnchantSense?

Choosing the right enchantments shouldn’t require memorizing wikis or guessing combinations.
EnchantSense gives you smart, accurate enchantment guidance instantly, without breaking immersion.

Whether you’re:

PvP fighting

Exploring

Mining

Optimizing gear

EnchantSense keeps the right information at your fingertips — simple, subtle, and powerful.
